landing.heroTitle: The smartest B2B lead generation platform
landing.heroSubtitle: Generate qualified leads from LinkedIn, enrich them with verified emails and AI-written icebreakers, manage your pipeline, and track ROI — all in one platform built to outperform any agency.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card required · First 50 leads free
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to dominate B2B sales
landing.featuresSubtitle: From lead discovery to closed deals, LeadGen CRM Automation handles the entire pipeline.
landing.feature1Desc: Scrape thousands of qualified company profiles from LinkedIn using our Apify-powered actor. Filter by industry, location, and company size.
landing.feature2Desc: Every lead gets a unique, personalized opening message generated by GPT-4, tailored to their industry and company profile.
landing.feature3Desc: Automatically find verified contact emails for each company by scanning their website — no manual research needed.
landing.feature4Desc: Track every lead through your sales pipeline with a Kanban board. Move leads from New to Qualified with a simple drag and drop.
landing.feature5Desc: Log deal values, track closed deals, and calculate your exact return on investment per lead generation session.
landing.feature6Desc: Invite your sales team, assign leads to agents, and manage roles — all from one centralized dashboard.
landing.feature7Desc: Define your Ideal Customer Profile and let AI find companies that match your criteria across industry, size, and location.
landing.feature8Desc: Automate personalized outreach campaigns with AI-generated emails, follow-ups, and reply tracking.
landing.feature9Desc: Get AI-powered recommendations for your next move on each lead — call, email, LinkedIn, or qualify.
landing.feature10Desc: Monitor social platforms for buying signals and convert intent signals into qualified leads automatically.
landing.feature11Desc: Schedule recurring lead generation runs. Set it once and let the system generate fresh leads on autopilot.
landing.howTitle: From zero to qualified leads in minutes
landing.step1Desc: Choose your target industry, location, seniority level, and segment preset. Set up in under 60 seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI pipeline scrapes LinkedIn, finds verified emails, and generates personalized icebreakers automatically.
landing.step3Desc: Review leads in list or Kanban view, update statuses, rate quality, and assign to your team.
landing.step4Desc: Export to CSV or JSON, track deal values, and measure your ROI — all in one place.
landing.testimonialsTitle: Trusted by sales teams across Central Europe
landing.testimonial1Text: We replaced our entire lead agency with LeadGen CRM Automation. We get 3x more qualified leads at 10% of the cost.
landing.testimonial2Text: The AI icebreakers are incredible. Our reply rate went from 4% to 23% in the first month.
landing.testimonial3Text: Finally a tool that understands the Czech and Slovak B2B market. The segment presets are spot on.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Scale with LeadOS as you grow. No hidden fees.
landing.plan1Desc: Perfect for solo founders and small teams testing the waters.
landing.plan2Desc: For growing sales teams that need real volume and automation.
landing.plan3Desc: Unlimited power for large sales organizations and agencies.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of Czech and Slovak sales teams already using LeadGen CRM Automation.
landing.heroTestimonialText: We replaced 3 tools with LeadGen CRM Automation. Our pipeline grew 340% in the first quarter. The AI icebreaker alone doubled our reply rates.
landing.industryPresetsSubtitle: Pre-configured targeting for the highest-converting B2B segments.
landing.resultsSubtitle: Real results from real B2B teams
landing.quantumSubtitle: Multi-stage AI orchestration with real-time data fusion
landing.howSectionSubtitle: No complex setup. No data science degree required. Just results.
landing.howStep1Desc: Tell the AI your ideal customer profile — industry, company size, seniority, tech stack.
landing.howStep2Desc: Our AI scrapes, enriches, and verifies 50–500 leads in under 5 minutes.
landing.howStep3Desc: AI writes unique icebreakers for each lead and launches multi-channel sequences.
landing.howStep4Desc: Track pipeline, score leads, and let the Chat Agent coach you to close faster.
